key_values: Node penalty removed for fish
change_description: Fish can now be sold at any Trade Manager at full price regardless of node connection. Previously unconnected nodes meant 30% value.

key_values: Orange grade fish added; Mastery system introduced
change_description: Fishing Mastery system added as part of Life Skill Mastery update. Orange grade (Prize Catch) fish introduced worth 1M-100M silver. Chance scales with Mastery (0% at 0, 3.75% at 1500, 6.25% at 3000). Ancient Relic Crystal Shard chance also increased. Manos fishing gear added.

key_values: Dark Chub, Flower Icefish, Charr + more
change_description: O'dyllita region launched with new freshwater fish species. Primary fishing at Salanar Pond and O'draxxia garden pond. Fish have extended freshness (originally 36h, later increased to 60h). Fish Workshop available.

key_values: 5 new Mystical Fish; Guru+ only; regular rod only
change_description: Mystical Fish added — extremely rare fish only catchable by Guru+ fishers with a regular fishing rod. Collecting all 5 types creates Stinky Fish for the 'God of Fishing' title.

key_values: Fish table %s leaked via BDOlytics
change_description: Pearl Abyss data leak exposed internal fish table percentages and catch rates. Data made available through BDOlytics. Formed basis for community fishing tools. INCREASINGLY OUTDATED due to subsequent patches.

key_values: Scaled Red Egg = 10M silver
change_description: Pufferfish event at seagull spots (requires Prof. Fishing Lv.5). Scaled Red Egg drop worth 10,000,000 silver.

key_values: Black Eye Crab areas expanded
change_description: Black Eye Crab (Prize Catch) fishing areas expanded to Iliya Island and Slippery Scallywags isle.

key_values: Silver Beltfish + Golden Sea Perch
change_description: 'Fishing for Silver and Gold' event — Silver Beltfish and Golden Sea Perch catchable at Velia, Heidel, Port Epheria, Altinova.

key_values: New seasonal content
change_description: Ice Fishing introduced as seasonal winter content.

key_values: Crystal Smelt + new freshwater species; 73h freshness
change_description: Mountain of Eternal Winter (Everfrost/Eilton) launched with new fishing content. New freshwater fish species including Crystal Smelt (ice fishing). Fish have 73h price guarantee (longest in game). Ice fishing mechanic available.

key_values: Blue+ grade fish prices DOUBLED (122 types)
change_description: Selling price of fish above blue grade DOUBLED affecting 122 fish types. Single largest fishing income buff since Mastery introduction.

key_values: Golden Seal acquisition improved
change_description: Improved method of obtaining 'Golden Seal – [Imperial Fishing]' through Imperial Fishing Delivery.

key_values: 10 junk items removed from loot table
change_description: Removed: Broken Bottle Fragment, Fertilizer Sack, Seaweed, Tattered Boots, Fish Bones, Broken Fish Hook, Snapped Rope, Torn Sail Piece, Rusty Anchor, Washed-Up Laundry. Probability redistributed to remaining items.

key_values: Discarded Glass Bottle added to loot table
change_description: Discarded Glass Bottle added at set probability, replacing junk items. Exchangeable with NPC Crio. Community considers this a net nerf to actual fish catch rates since Glass Bottles occupy a loot slot.

key_values: New quests, NPC changed to Crio
change_description: Fishing Leap quest difficulty adjusted, completion NPC changed to Crio, new Fishing Leap quests added.

key_values: ALL trade items (incl fish) prices DOUBLED
change_description: Major trade system overhaul. Selling price of ALL regular trade items (fish, crafting boxes, Ancient Gold Coins etc.) DOUBLED. This is a SECOND doubling on top of Oct 2022 fish-specific doubling. Desert Trading Buff removed. Imperial Trade Delivery and Smuggling removed from game.

key_values: More NPCs accept imperial deliveries
change_description: Imperial Fishing Delivery NPCs in areas outside major cities now accept deliveries. Imperial Delivery title removed from old NPCs. 0 Silver display bug fixed.

key_values: Fish from wrong origins fixed
change_description: Fixed issue where fish from different origins were caught in inaccessible areas.

key_values: 38 new fishing titles; Sea Palace fishing zone
change_description: Land of the Morning Light launched with fishing content. 38 new titles obtainable through fishing. Sea Palace accessible via portal in LoML waters (east of Nampo's Moodle Village). New fish species in freshwater areas.

key_values: 5 new fish species; Miraculous Fish Tank (50 slots, 5x time)
change_description: New fish species (Surfperch, Scorpion Fish, Tongue Sole, Squid, Flounder) added to Margoria near Sea Palace. Shim Cheong's Miraculous Fish Tank introduced: stores 50 fish, time flows 5x slower.

key_values: 45 new Prize Catch species across fresh/saltwater
change_description: Largest fish species expansion since Mastery introduction. 45 new Prize Catch fish added at specific freshwater and seawater points. Cannot be used for Imperial Fishing Delivery. Rarer fish = higher trade prices (1M-100M silver range). NOTE: Pricing discrepancy discovered at launch, fixed Nov 21 with compensation.

key_values: Mako Shark (harpoon); Bahaba (normal fishing)
change_description: Mako Shark now obtainable through harpooning. Bahaba now obtainable through normal fishing. Bottle with a Note now stacks in inventory.

key_values: General fish price increase from traders
change_description: Trade managers started purchasing fish at higher prices. Patch notes stated traders had 'started purchasing fish at higher prices than before.'

key_values: Yellow-grade fish at set probability in Kama lakes
change_description: New fish species appearing in Lake Kamasylvia, Lake Grana, and Lake Flondor. Yellow-grade fish now catchable at a set probability in these lakes.

key_values: Prize rate 3% fixed; every 180s while sailing
change_description: Carrack Sailor Fishing via Oceanbound Otter Fishing Rod. Fishing while sailing every 180 seconds (stationary = paused). Does NOT use Fishing Mastery. Prize rate originally 1%, bumped to 3%. Cabin expanded 100→110.

key_values: Permanent content; 300 winners; Mon-Sat
change_description: Weekly Fishing Contest became permanent (was event). Target fish refresh Sunday: 1 Prize, 1 Rare, 1 High-quality. Ranks by max size. Top 3 earn Tidal Tokens.

key_values: 3 tiers of new fishing buff draught
change_description: Tidal Draught, Blue Tidal Draught, Deep Blue Tidal Draught added. Craftable via Simple Alchemy. All pre-orders/listings for old fishing elixirs cancelled on Central Market.

key_values: Fourfinger Threadfin: Freshwater → Saltwater
change_description: Fourfinger Threadfin reclassified from Freshwater to Saltwater in Knowledge (H).

key_values: O'dyllita fish: 36h → 60h price guarantee
change_description: Price guarantee period for O'dyllita fish increased from 36 hours to 60 hours. Fish in Miraculous Fish Tanks got +120h, inventory fish got +24h during maintenance.

key_values: 14 new fish species (fresh + salt)
change_description: Edana region launched with 14 new fish: Swamp Eel, Pike Characin, Lungfish, Giant Talking Catfish, Longnose Gar, Goliath Tigerfish, Obtuse Barracuda, Ribbon Eel, Wrought Iron Butterflyfish, Goldenstriped Soapfish, Opah, Redfin Anthias, Polka-dot Stingray, Pinecone Fish. Fish Workshop added to Edana.

key_values: Polka-dot Stingray + Pinecone Fish removed from Imperial
change_description: Polka-dot Stingray and Pinecone Fish changed so they can no longer be sent via Imperial Delivery.

key_values: Pirarucu x6.2; White Crucian Carp x4.4; Ranchu x4
change_description: Increased spawn rate of Prize Catch in Heidel and Calpheon. Pirarucu catch rate increased ~6.2x in Heidel. White Crucian Carp ~4.4x and Ranchu ~4x in Calpheon. First confirmed use of large multiplicative modifiers to fish tables.

key_values: Pirarucu -39%; Ranchu/WCC -37%
change_description: Jan 29 buffs partially rolled back. Pirarucu appearance reduced ~39% in Heidel. Ranchu and White Crucian Carp reduced ~37% in Calpheon. Reason: 'caught somewhat excessively.'

key_values: Rainbowfish x10 in Valencia; new spawns
change_description: Prize Catch fish added to inland Valencia. Rainbowfish probability increased ~10x in existing areas. New Rainbowfish spawns in Valencia inland lake area including capital city.

key_values: Pink Dolphin x2 in Grana; replaces White Grouper
change_description: Pink Dolphins added to larger cities of Grana. Probability increased ~2x in existing areas. Grana upper reaches changed from White Groupers/Albino Coelacanths to Pink Dolphins.

key_values: Spawning changes in Heidel/Grana
change_description: Changed spawning of Mudskipper in Demi River (Heidel region) and Lake Flondor (Grana).
